K AMAL PLASTICS
Welcome to Kamal Plastics, where we are dedicated to providing top-quality plastic products to a wide range
of industries. Our team is made up of experts in manufacturing and quality assurance, ensuring that our
products are always up to par.
ABOUT KAMAL PLASTICS
Our History
Kamal Plastics has been
around for over 30 years,
working to provide quality
plastic products to businesses
and individuals across the
country.
Our Mission
We are committed to delivering
high-quality, cost-effective
solutions to our clients while
striving to minimize our
environmental impact.
Our Values
•Integrity
•Quality
•Innovation
•Sustainability
OUR PRODUCTS
Containers
We manufacture a wide range of
containers suitable for various
industries, including food,
pharmaceuticals, and chemicals.
Bottles
Our bottles come in various
sizes and shapes and are an
excellent choice for beverages,
cleaning agents, and other
liquids.
MANUFACTURING PROCESS
1Step 1: Material Procurement
We use only top-grade raw materials
sourced from reliable suppliers to ensure
quality.
2
Step 2: Production
Our experts use state-of-the-art
machinery to manufacture our products
with precision and care. 3Step 3: Quality Assurance
Our products are tested under stringent
quality measures to ensure they meet
the required standards.
4
Step 4: Packaging & Shipping
Our products are carefully packaged for
shipping, ensuring that they reach our
clients in excellent condition.
